title: Book Now parity work
description: Durable Book Now AI pipeline parity: single shared pricing path (buildPhotoEstimate) across the inline customer estimate and the durable recovery worker, unified queue/stage model, and KPI/stage consistency.
rollbackSteps: Revert the sync PR; the shared pricing path is additive but touches the worker — verify the downstream cron wiring after revert.
compatibilityNotes: Depends on downstream having the same disposal/pricing engine + Redis booking store.

history.note: Registered from completed upstream Book Now work.
